hematologist.title: Hematologist
hematologist.description: Specialist in blood disorders and diseases of the blood-forming organs

hematologist_oncologist.title: Hematologist-Oncologist
hematologist_oncologist.description: Specialist in blood cancers and related malignancies

endocrinologist.title: Endocrinologist
endocrinologist.description: Specialist in hormonal disorders including diabetes and thyroid conditions

nephrologist.title: Nephrologist
nephrologist.description: Specialist in kidney diseases and disorders

oncologist.title: Oncologist
oncologist.description: Specialist in cancer diagnosis and treatment

urologist.title: Urologist
urologist.description: Specialist in urinary tract and male reproductive system disorders

cardiologist.title: Cardiologist
cardiologist.description: Specialist in heart and cardiovascular diseases

general_practitioner.title: General Practitioner
general_practitioner.description: Primary care physician for general health concerns

urgent.action: Contact your doctor immediately or go to urgent care

soon.action: Schedule an appointment with a specialist promptly

routine.action: Schedule a routine appointment with a specialist
